title: User Registration
story: As a visitor, I want to register with email/password so I can access the platform.
acceptance_criteria: Form requests: name, email, password (min 8 chars), confirmation
Email must be unique
Email format validation
Password stored hashed (bcrypt)
New user gets 'student' role by default
Success message shown after registration
Redirect to dashboard after successful registration

title: Login
story: As a registered user, I want to log in so I can access my dashboard.
acceptance_criteria: Form requests email and password
Shows error if credentials are invalid
On success, receives Sanctum auth token
Token stored securely (httpOnly cookie or localStorage with interceptor)
Role-based redirect: admin→dashboard, instructor→my courses, student→catalog

title: User Management (Admin)
story: As an admin, I want to CRUD users so I can maintain the platform.
acceptance_criteria: User list with pagination and search by name/email
Create form with: name, email, password, role
Edit: allows changing name, email, role, status (active/inactive)
Logical deletion (soft delete or mark inactive)
Only admins can access this feature

title: Password Recovery
story: As a user, I want to recover my password if I forget it.
acceptance_criteria: Recovery form requests email
Sends email with recovery link/token (simulated)
Token expires in 1 hour
New password form with confirmation

title: Public Course Catalog
story: As a visitor, I want to browse the course catalog with filters.
acceptance_criteria: Course list with: title, short description, level, category, duration
Filters by: level, category, price
Pagination (10 courses per page)
Search by title

title: Course Detail
story: As a student, I want to view course details before enrolling.
acceptance_criteria: Shows: title, full description, syllabus, requirements, level, duration, instructor
Indicates if course requires specific subscription plan
Shows enroll button if user has access

title: Create/Edit Courses (Instructor)
story: As an instructor, I want to create and edit my own courses.
acceptance_criteria: Form with: title, description, syllabus, duration, level, category, requirements
Instructor can only edit their own courses
Courses default to 'unpublished'
Validation of required fields

title: Course Management (Admin)
story: As an admin, I want to manage all courses (full CRUD).
acceptance_criteria: List of all courses (published and unpublished)
Create, edit, publish/unpublish, delete courses
Assign instructor to a course

title: View Subscription Plans
story: As a student, I want to view available subscription plans.
acceptance_criteria: Shows 3 plans: Basic, Pro, Premium
Each plan shows: name, price, duration, max_courses, description
Indicates if plan is unlimited (Premium)

title: Subscribe to a Plan
story: As a student, I want to subscribe to a plan to access courses.
acceptance_criteria: Plan selection → redirect to payment gateway
After successful payment, creates subscription with status 'active'
end_date calculated automatically from plan's duration_days
Corresponding payment record created
Confirmation notification

title: Auto-Renewal
story: As a student, I want my subscription to auto-renew.
acceptance_criteria: User can enable/disable auto_renew
When enabled, simulates charge at expiry
end_date extended by plan's duration_days
New payment record created

title: Subscription History
story: As a student, I want to view my subscription history.
acceptance_criteria: Chronological list with: plan, dates, status, amount paid
Visual indicator of active subscription

title: Payment via Test Gateway
story: As a student, I want to pay via Stripe/PayPal sandbox.
acceptance_criteria: Integration with Stripe Checkout (test mode) or PayPal Sandbox
Shows payment summary: plan, amount, taxes (if applicable)
After successful payment, creates record in payments table
Handles payment errors (card declined, etc.)

title: Payment Confirmation
story: As a student, I want payment confirmation before activation.
acceptance_criteria: Confirmation screen with: transaction_id, amount, date, plan
Sends confirmation email (simulated)
Subscription activates only when status = completed

title: Transaction Records (Admin)
story: As an admin, I want to view all payment transactions.
acceptance_criteria: List with: user, plan, amount, date, method, status
Filters by status, date, payment method
Exportable to CSV/PDF

title: Access by Subscription
story: As a student, I want to see only courses allowed by my plan.
acceptance_criteria: Courses show indicator if user's plan allows access
If no active subscription, shows prompt to subscribe
Basic: access to beginner level courses
Pro: access to beginner + intermediate courses
Premium: access to all courses

title: Course Enrollment
story: As a student with active subscription, I want to enroll in a course.
acceptance_criteria: Enroll button visible if user has access
Validates subscription is active
Registers in course_enrollments with progress = 0
Prevents double enrollment to same course

title: Progress Tracking
story: As a student, I want to track my progress in enrolled courses.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard shows enrolled courses with progress bar
Progress percentage (0-100%)
Course marked complete when progress = 100%
Completion date recorded

title: Monthly Revenue by Plan
story: As an admin, I want monthly revenue broken down by subscription type.
acceptance_criteria: Bar chart or table with: month, plan, subscription count, total revenue
Date range filter
Exportable to PDF/CSV

title: Top 5 Enrolled Courses
story: As an admin, I want the top 5 most enrolled courses.
acceptance_criteria: Table/list with: course, instructor, enrollment count, level
Sorted descending by enrollments
Period filter

title: Active vs Inactive Students
story: As an admin, I want a report of active vs inactive students.
acceptance_criteria: Pie chart with: active (current subscription), inactive (no subscription)
Numeric count of each group
Registration date filter
